findings.message: redis-exporter service added but no corresponding Prometheus scrape job configured in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml. Metrics will not be collected.
findings.suggestion: Add a scrape job for redis-exporter in prometheus.yml: '- job_name: redis\n  static_configs:\n    - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]'
